TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: cyugal hkuy na puniq hiya ga cyugal zyuwaw qu baqun pcyana puniq hiya, "mutuw msuling na qeqaya" , "praw pcyana" ru "ps'aring smkilux" . "mutuw msuling na qeqaya" hiya ga baq msuling na qeqaya, mye'a su qhuniq ini ga ruma. "praw pcyana" hiya ga baq raw msuling na qeqaya, mye'a su Yang-ci maki sa insuna. "ps'aring smkilux / kinmkilux na pcyana" hiya ga, tehuk qu kinmkilux niya lga, baq mcyana qu qeqaya la. imi ptnaq kwara qu ps'aring smkilux na qeqaya hiya, kruma ga rroq ps'aring smkilux niya, zinga mcyana. kruma ga wagiq qu ps'aring smkilux niya, zihung mcyana.
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ju…£al ńßkuj na puniq ńßija …£a ¶~ ®ju…£al zjuwaw qu ő≤aqun p ¶~ ®jana puniq ńßija, "mutuw ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja" , "praw p ¶~ ®jana" ru "ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux" . "mutuw ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja" ńßija …£a ő≤aq ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja, mje Ēa s~…ēu qńßuniq ini …£a ruma. "praw p ¶~ ®jana" ńßija …£a ő≤aq raw ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja, mje Ēa s~…ēu jaŇč- ¶~ ®i maki s~…ēa ins~…ēuna. "ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux / kinmkilux na p ¶~ ®jana" ńßija …£a, teńßuk qu kinmkilux nija l…£a, ő≤aq m ¶~ ®jana qu qeqaja la. imi ptnaq kwara qu ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux na qeqaja ńßija, kruma …£a rroq ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux nija, ziŇča m ¶~ ®jana. kruma …£a wa…£iq qu ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux nija, zińßuŇč m ¶~ ®jana.
S.FORM: cyugal hkuy na puniq hiya ga cyugal zyuwaw qu baqun pcyana puniq hiya, "mutuw msuling na qeqaya" , "praw pcyana" ru "ps'aring smkilux" . "mutuw msuling na qeqaya" hiya ga baq msuling na qeqaya, mye'a su qhuniq ini ga ruma. "praw pcyana" hiya ga baq raw msuling na qeqaya, mye'a su Yang-ci maki sa insuna. "ps'aring smkilux / kinmkilux na pcyana" hiya ga, tehuk qu kinmkilux niya lga, baq mcyana qu qeqaya la. imi ptnaq kwara qu ps'aring smkilux na qeqaya hiya, kruma ga rroq ps'aring smkilux niya, zinga mcyana. kruma ga wagiq qu ps'aring smkilux niya, zihung mcyana.
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ju…£al ńßkuj na puniq ńßija …£a ¶~ ®ju…£al zjuwaw qu ő≤aqun p ¶~ ®jana puniq ńßija, "mutuw ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja" , "praw p ¶~ ®jana" ru "ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux" . "mutuw ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja" ńßija …£a ő≤aq ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja, mje Ēa s~…ēu qńßuniq ini …£a ruma. "praw p ¶~ ®jana" ńßija …£a ő≤aq raw ms~…ēuliŇč na qeqaja, mje Ēa s~…ēu jaŇč- ¶~ ®i maki s~…ēa ins~…ēuna. "ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux / kinmkilux na p ¶~ ®jana" ńßija …£a, teńßuk qu kinmkilux nija l…£a, ő≤aq m ¶~ ®jana qu qeqaja la. imi ptnaq kwara qu ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux na qeqaja ńßija, kruma …£a rroq ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux nija, ziŇča m ¶~ ®jana. kruma …£a wa…£iq qu ps~…ē ĒariŇč s~…ēmkilux nija, zińßuŇč m ¶~ ®jana.
